title: Best of Kenya Safari – Central and South Edition
description: Kenya pioneered the safari experience and remains a country of striking contrasts, from snow-capped mountains to lush tropical forests and golden beaches. This safari explores the central highlands, Lake Nakuru, and the Maasai Mara, offering iconic wildlife experiences and opportunities to witness the Great Wildebeest Migration between July and October.
highlights: Wildlife viewing at The Ark in the Aberdares
Flamingoes and rhinos at Lake Nakuru
Game drives in the Maasai Mara
Opportunity to witness the Great Wildebeest Migration (July–October)
Exclusive safari experience in a Landcruiser with a professional guide

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Aberdares
itinerary.description: Depart Nairobi after breakfast for the central highlands, arriving at Aberdares Country Club for lunch. Transfer to The Ark for afternoon wildlife viewing and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Aberdares to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: After breakfast, depart for Lake Nakuru National Park. Check in at Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge for lunch followed by an afternoon game drive among flamingoes, rhinos, and other wildlife.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Drive to Maasai Mara, arriving at Mara Elatia Camp for lunch. Afternoon game drive in Maasai Mara. Enjoy views of wildlife and optional encounters with predators. Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Full Day Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game drives in the Maasai Mara with morning and afternoon drives. Optional full-day game drive with packed lunch available.

itinerary.title: Departure from Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning game drive followed by breakfast and departure to Nairobi in the early afternoon.

included: Accommodation on full board basis in the mentioned lodges
Exclusive use of the safari-equipped Landcruiser (not shared)
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
notIncluded: Personal expenses such as travel insurance, laundry, phone calls, extra meals/drinks
accommodation: Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge – Lake Nakuru (1 night)
Mara Elatia Camp – Maasai Mara (1 night)
Ashnil Mara Camp – Maasai Mara (1 night)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, a hat and sunglasses. Early mornings and evenings can be cool in the highlands, so a sweater or light jacket is recommended.
travelInfo.food: Most lodges serve buffet-style meals with desserts; some offer set menus. Food is of international standard prepared by professional chefs.

note: Adventures Connect LTD reserves the right to substitute accommodations with similar facilities in circumstances beyond our control.
